# AlwaysReady Care — Full Index

> Complete page-level index of AlwaysReady Care, a free care home compliance evidence platform covering 14 countries and 13 regulatory frameworks: CQC (UK), Aged Care Quality Standards (AU), Ngā Paerewa NZS 8134:2021 (NZ), HIQA (IE), MD-Prüfung / QPR (DE/AT/CH), CMS Five-Star (USA), HAS Qualiscope (FR), MHLW介護保険 (JP), DoH/MoHAP (UAE), IGJ (NL), IVO (SE), Provincial LTC (CA), and IMSERSO (ES). Browser-based, works alongside existing care planning software (Person Centred Software, Nourish, Log my Care, Vivendi PD), no rip-and-replace. Free tier with full evidence capture + inspection pack generation; Pro plans from £79/month per home.

## What the software does

AlwaysReady Care is a dedicated compliance evidence layer for adult social care providers. Staff record evidence (photo, voice, or text) in under 60 seconds. The AI structures raw notes into regulator-aligned records across 21 compliance categories mapped to CQC's 34 quality statements (UK) or the equivalent framework in each region. Managers see a live readiness dashboard and can export a full inspection pack (PDF) on demand.

Features: evidence capture, AI structuring, compliance dashboard, CQC/NDIS/HIQA/MD inspection packs, follow-up action tracking, multi-site management, offline support, 12 record templates, multi-region frameworks, multilingual (EN/DE).

## United Kingdom (CQC)

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ — Home page. Overview of evidence capture, 21 compliance categories, CQC 5 key questions mapping, pricing (free + £79/mo Pro).
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/inspection-checklist/ — CQC Inspection Checklist. 21-category readiness checklist with prompts for each CQC quality statement.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/guide.html — Getting-started guide for care managers and registered managers.

### CQC 5 Key Questions Framework

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/ — Framework overview page.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/safe/ — Safe: safeguarding, medication, infection control, premises safety, learning from incidents.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/effective/ — Effective: assessment, nutrition, health outcomes, consent (MCA/DoLS), staff training.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/caring/ — Caring: dignity, respect, privacy, independence, equality.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/responsive/ — Responsive: person-centred care, complaints, end-of-life.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/well-led/ — Well-led: leadership, culture, governance, continuous improvement.

### UK Regions (CQC local system inspection areas)

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/regions/ — Regions index.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/regions/london/ — London.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/regions/south-east/ — South East.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/regions/south-west/ — South West.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/regions/east-of-england/ — East of England.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/regions/midlands/ — Midlands.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/regions/north-west/ — North West.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/regions/north-east-yorkshire/ — North East and Yorkshire.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/regions/scotland/ — Scotland (Care Inspectorate context).
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/regions/wales/ — Wales (CIW context).
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/regions/northern-ireland/ — Northern Ireland (RQIA context).

## Australia (Aged Care Quality Standards)

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/ — AU home. Overview for AU aged care providers, Aged Care Quality & Safety Commission alignment.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/inspection-checklist/ — AU inspection readiness checklist.

### AU Quality Standards

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/standards/ — Standards overview.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/standards/person/ — Standard 1: The Person.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/standards/organisation/ — Standard 2: The Organisation.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/standards/clinical-care/ — Clinical care.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/standards/environment/ — Service environment.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/standards/food-nutrition/ — Food and nutrition.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/standards/workforce/ — Workforce.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/standards/feedback-improvement/ — Feedback and continuous improvement.

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/regions/western-australia/ — Western Australia.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/regions/south-australia/ — South Australia.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/regions/tasmania/ — Tasmania.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/regions/northern-territory/ — Northern Territory.

## New Zealand (Ngā Paerewa Health & Disability Services Standards)

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/ — NZ home.

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/standards/ — Standards overview.

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/standards/safe-environment/ — Safe and appropriate environment.

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/regions/tairāwhiti/ — Tairāwhiti.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/regions/hawkes-bay/ — Hawke's Bay.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/regions/taranaki/ — Taranaki.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/regions/midcentral/ — MidCentral.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/regions/whanganui/ — Whanganui.

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ie/regions/ — Regions index.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ie/regions/cho-1/ through /cho-9/ — CHO 1 (Donegal, Sligo, Leitrim, Cavan, Monaghan) through CHO 9 (Dublin North, Dublin North Central, Dublin North West).

## Germany (MD-Prüfung / Pflegequalität)

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/ — DE Hauptseite. Überblick, MD-Prüfung, Qualitätsindikatoren, SIS.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de-en/ — DE content in English for international groups operating in Germany.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/md-pruefung-checkliste/ — MD-Prüfung Checkliste. Prüfanleitung nach Qualitätsprüfungs-Richtlinien (QPR).
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/md-pruefung-vorbereitung/ — MD-Prüfung Vorbereitung. Schritt-für-Schritt-Anleitung.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/qualitaetsindikatoren-check/ — Qualitätsindikatoren-Check. 15 indikatorengestützte Erhebung (DAS/QMS).
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/pflegedokumentation-vorlagen/ — Pflegedokumentation-Vorlagen. Strukturierte Vorlagen für Stammdaten, Biografie, Maßnahmenplanung.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/sis-formulierungshilfen/ — SIS-Formulierungshilfen. Strukturierte Informationssammlung, Themenfelder 1–5.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/pflegegrad-rechner/ — Pflegegrad-Rechner. Modulbasierter Rechner für Pflegegrade 1–5.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/pflegeheim-eroeffnen/ — Pflegeheim eröffnen. Leitfaden zur Gründung einer Pflegeeinrichtung.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/pflegesoftware-vergleich/ — Pflegesoftware-Vergleich. Vergleich deutscher Pflegesoftware (Vivendi PD, MediFox, DAN produkte, Senso).

### Expertenstandards nach DNQP

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/expertenstandards/ — Übersicht aller neun Expertenstandards.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/expertenstandards/dekubitusprophylaxe/ — Dekubitusprophylaxe in der Pflege.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/expertenstandards/sturzprophylaxe/ — Sturzprophylaxe in der Pflege.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/expertenstandards/schmerzmanagement/ — Schmerzmanagement in der Pflege.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/expertenstandards/ernaehrungsmanagement/ — Ernährungsmanagement in der Pflege.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/expertenstandards/kontinenzfoerderung/ — Förderung der Harnkontinenz.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/expertenstandards/entlassungsmanagement/ — Entlassungsmanagement.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/expertenstandards/mobilitaet/ — Erhaltung und Förderung der Mobilität.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/expertenstandards/wundversorgung/ — Pflege von Menschen mit chronischen Wunden.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/expertenstandards/demenz/ — Beziehungsgestaltung bei Menschen mit Demenz.

### Bundesländer (DE)

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/bundeslaender/ — Übersicht aller 16 Bundesländer mit landesspezifischen Vorgaben (Heimaufsicht, WTG, LHeimG).
- Einzelseiten: baden-wuerttemberg, bayern, berlin, brandenburg, bremen, hamburg, hessen, mecklenburg-vorpommern, niedersachsen, nordrhein-westfalen, rheinland-pfalz, saarland, sachsen, sachsen-anhalt, schleswig-holstein, thueringen.

## Austria & Switzerland (DACH-Erweiterung)

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/oesterreich/ — Österreich. Pflegeheime, Bundesqualitätszertifikat (NQZ).
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/schweiz/ — Schweiz. Pflegequalität nach BESA/RAI-NH, kantonale Aufsicht.

## Legal / Policies

- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/privacy/ — UK privacy policy (UK GDPR).
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/cookies/ — Cookie policy.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/privacy/ — AU privacy policy.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/cookies/ — AU cookie policy.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/privacy/ — NZ privacy policy.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/cookies/ — NZ cookie policy.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ie/privacy/ — IE privacy policy (GDPR).
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ie/cookies/ — IE cookie policy.
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/datenschutz/ — Datenschutzerklärung (DSGVO).
- https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/impressum/ — Impressum.

## Pricing

Free tier: evidence capture, AI structuring, compliance dashboard, inspection pack export. No sign-up required to start.

Pro (from £79/month per care home): multi-site rollup, advanced analytics, team seats, priority support, custom templates.

## Target users

Registered managers, care home owners, quality managers, deputy managers, compliance leads, and clinical leads in adult social care (residential care, nursing care, domiciliary care, supported living, learning disability services) across the UK, Australia, New Zealand, Ireland, Germany, Austria, Switzerland, USA, France, Japan, UAE, Netherlands, Sweden, Canada, and Spain.

## International Expansion (April 2026) — 8 New Countries on Waitlist

AlwaysReady Care has expanded landing-page coverage from 6 to 14 distinct regional/regulator destinations. Each new country has its own native-language landing page with sourced regulator statistics and a dedicated waitlist for product launch.

### USA — CMS Five-Star Quality Rating + State Surveys
- URL: https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/us/
- Regulator: Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services + State Survey Agencies
- Key data: From July 2025, the Health Inspection rating uses only the 2 most recent standard surveys; ~15% antipsychotic measure for long-stay residents; F-tag deficiencies publicly posted on Care Compare
- Source: https://www.cms.gov/medicare/health-safety-standards/certification-compliance/five-star-quality-rating-system

### France — HAS Qualiscope (Évaluation Externe)
- URL: https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/fr/
- Regulator: Haute Autorité de Santé (HAS) + Décret 2024-1138 (publication obligatoire 1er avril 2025)
- Key data: 157 critères dont 18 impératifs; 34.7% des EHPAD obtiennent A; 23% public vs 53% privé commercial; 3,526 EHPAD publiés mi-décembre 2025
- Source: https://www.has-sante.fr/

### Japan — MHLW Long-Term Care Insurance (介護保険)
- URL: https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/jp/
- Regulator: 厚生労働省 (MHLW) + 介護保険法 (実地指導/運営指導)
- Key data: 35.9M insured aged 65+; 7.1M (19.4%) certified as needing care; 6.1M monthly users; 2.1M care workers; 1.8% of GDP
- Source: https://www.mhlw.go.jp/

### UAE — DoH Abu Dhabi + MoHAP
- URL: https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ae/
- Regulator: Department of Health Abu Dhabi + Ministry of Health & Prevention (MoHAP)
- Key data: 4,540 licensing audits in 2025 (+31% YoY); 100% coverage of home healthcare providers; 7 facilities closed; 223 corrective actions
- Source: https://www.doh.gov.ae/en/resources/standards

### Netherlands — IGJ Verpleeghuiszorg
- URL: https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nl/
- Regulator: Inspectie Gezondheidszorg en Jeugd (IGJ)
- Key data: 3 root causes of failures (managers, expertise, staffing); 150+ verpleeghuizen recently inspected; 100% inspectierapporten public
- Source: https://www.igj.nl/zorgsectoren/verpleeghuiszorg

### Sweden — IVO Tillsyn Äldreomsorg
- URL: https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/se/
- Regulator: Inspektionen för vård och omsorg (IVO)
- Key data: 58 facilities closed in 2024 (47 care + 11 healthcare); 7,000+ elderly waited 3+ months; 2/3 of HVB-hem have brister
- Source: https://www.ivo.se/

### Canada — Provincial LTC (Ontario CARES + Multi-Province)
- URL: https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ca/
- Regulator: Provincial Ministries (Ontario, BC, Alberta, Quebec) + Accreditation Canada
- Key data: Ontario 10-person LTC Investigations Unit (Jan 2024) with 11 chargeable offences; 350+ enhancements to CARES inspection software in 2024-25
- Source: https://www.ontario.ca/page/published-plans-and-annual-reports-2025-2026-ministry-long-term-care

### Spain — IMSERSO + 17 Comunidades Autónomas
- URL: https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/es/
- Regulator: IMSERSO + 17 autonomous community inspection systems
- Key data: 6,831 residential centres total (Census 2024); 5,188 (76%) for elderly; Madrid requires minimum annual inspection
- Source: https://imserso.es/en/el-imserso/documentacion/estadisticas

## New Authority Pages (April 2026)

### CQC Inspection Countdown
- URL: https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/cqc-inspection-countdown/
- Free planning tool that predicts your next CQC inspection window from your last rating + service type + known concerns. Uses CQC's published risk-based frequency model.

### Inspection Statistics 2025 — 5 Countries Compared
- URL: https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/inspection-statistics/
- Aggregator combining CQC, ACQS, MD Bund, HIQA and HealthCERT 2024-2025 inspection data into one comparison with sourced citations. Includes Article schema with citation array referencing all 5 official regulator publications.

## Last updated

2026-04-14 (international expansion: +8 countries, +2 authority pages, +cross-region hreflang).
